service.name: Google Ads API
service.description_for_ai: Google advertising platform API. Create and manage search, display, video ads. Access campaign performance, keywords, bids, budgets, conversions. $150B+ annual ad spend flows through Google Ads. Use for advertising automation, campaign management, reporting.

auth.how_to_get: Google Ads account + Developer Token from https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/first-call/overview
auth.cost: Free API. Ad spend is charged per click/impression

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get campaign performance metrics: impressions, clicks, conversions, cost, CTR, CPC, ROAS.

query.description: GAQL query e.g. SELECT campaign.name, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new Google Ads campaign with budget, bidding strategy, targeting, and campaign type settings.

operations.description: [{create: {name, status: ENABLED, advertisingChannelType: SEARCH, campaignBudget, biddingStrategyType}}]
